title: neoboutonia africana
intro: Neoboutonia africana, also known as African Neoboutonia or African ironwood, is a medicinal plant species native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and supporting digestion, as well as providing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, Neoboutonia africana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
